name: Best Rum Cake Ever
recipeInstructions:
1. Before starting, taste a sample of the rum to ensure quality.
2. Select appropriate mixing bowls and measuring cups.
3. Taste another sample of the rum to confirm its quality.
4. In a large bowl, beat 1 cup butter with 1 teaspoon sugar until fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in the dried fruit, lemon juice, and nuts.
7. Sift baking powder and soda into the batter and mix until smooth.
8. Fold in brown sugar to achieve desired color and flavor.
9. Grease an oven-safe cake pan.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 350°F (175°C) for the specified time.
11. Check the rum's quality before serving.
